historical_parallel: The Trial of Gilles de Rais (1440)
era_resolution: Executions and public shaming were used to restore social order
modern_resolution: Advanced forensic analysis, global cooperation, and rehabilitation programs would be utilized to address the systemic issues

biblical_tie.context: Beware of false prophets, who come to you in sheep's clothing but inwardly are ravenous wolves
